parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your English-speaking friend Nina and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Nina
Subject: Free concert ticket!

Hi!

My sister bought two tickets for the big concert in the park next Saturday evening, but now she can't go — so I have a free ticket for you!

Do you want to come? The concert starts at seven, but we should get there early. Where shall we meet?

Nina

bullets: thank Nina and accept the ticket
suggest where and when to meet
say how you will get home after the concert
ask one question about the concert

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: MUSIC IN MY LIFE
stimulus.body: What kind of music do you listen to, and when do you listen to it? Write an article about the music you love and what it means to you. The best articles will be published next month.

bullets: what kind of music you like
when and where you listen to it
why music is important to you

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: Just before the band came on stage, Omar felt his phone vibrate in his pocket.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

Just before the band came on stage, Omar felt his phone vibrate in his pocket.
